text.content:
Injuries • Piercing • Beastly Puncture Wound

Injury Card

Beastly Puncture Wound

A mischievous goblin has replaced your veins with vines. Bleeding out? More like... watering. Sunlight exposure may lead to sprouting flowers from your ears.

Fanged Marking
Treatment

Bathe in moonlit water under the guidance of a wise treant. Apply a paste made from crushed sunstones to your wounds.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 2400

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Piercing

  • odds: 60

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Beastly Puncture Wound

  • imagetitle: Fanged Marking

  • image: icons/skills/melee/strike-polearm-light-orange.webp

  • description: A mischievous goblin has replaced your veins with vines. Bleeding out? More like... watering. Sunlight exposure may lead to sprouting flowers from your ears.

  • treatment: Bathe in moonlit water under the guidance of a wise treant. Apply a paste made from crushed sunstones to your wounds.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 2

  • duration: 14400

  • action: Apply the Piercing Injury

  • statuseffect: Poisoned

Injuries • Piercing • Dragon's Pointed Reminder

Injury Card

Dragon's Pointed Reminder

A hyperactive dragon decided to leave a memento of your encounter by embedding a heated dragon's nail in your shoulder. Your new talents include boiling water by just touching it.

Fiery Calligraphy
Treatment

Cool your wounds by swimming in a freezing glacier. Bring a smith to craft custom ice armor on the affected area.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Piercing • Impaled Appendage

Injury Card

Impaled Appendage

The brutal impalement of an appendage sends waves of shock through the body, as the offending object pierces through muscle and bone with relentless force. Each movement a torment, as the impaled limb hangs in a precarious balance.

Treatment

The brutal impalement of an appendage sends waves of shock through the body, as the offending object pierces through muscle and bone with relentless force. Each movement a torment, as the impaled limb hangs in a precarious balance.

  • Damage: 8 Hit Points

Injuries • Piercing • Impaled Misery

Injury Card

Impaled Misery

A severe injury has left the character impaled on a sharp object. The pain is excruciating, and movement is severely restricted as blood loss weakens the body.

Wrenching Agony
Treatment

Immediate medical attention needed to remove the impaling object and address the wound.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Restrained

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Piercing • Penetrating Trauma

Injury Card

Penetrating Trauma

The penetrating trauma of a deep stab pierces through layers of tissue, leaving a trail of destruction and pain in its wake. Each touch a torment, as the wound bleeds profusely and demands urgent attention.

Treatment

Immediate wound assessment and appropriate hemostatic measures are vital for managing the penetrating trauma. Surgical intervention and ongoing medical care are essential for addressing internal damage and preventing complications.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 71

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Immediate wound assessment and appropriate hemostatic measures are vital for managing the penetrating trauma. Surgical intervention and ongoing medical care are essential for addressing internal damage and preventing complications.

Injuries • Piercing • Piercing Wound

Injury Card

Piercing Wound

The sharp puncture of the piercing wound penetrates with pinpoint accuracy, leaving a pathway of destruction in its wake. Each stab, a jolt of searing pain, as the wound bleeds freely and demands attention.

Treatment

Immediate wound care, including cleaning, disinfection, and appropriate dressing, is critical for preventing infection and promoting healing. Monitoring for signs of inflammation and seeking medical evaluation for deep punctures are essential for optimal recovery.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Immediate wound care, including cleaning, disinfection, and appropriate dressing, is critical for preventing infection and promoting healing. Monitoring for signs of inflammation and seeking medical evaluation for deep punctures are essential for optimal recovery.

Injuries • Piercing • Pinprick Of Pain

Injury Card

Pinprick Of Pain

The character feels a sudden sharp pain as if pricked by a hundred needles. The discomfort lingers, causing mild irritation and some difficulty in movement.

Apothecary Tincture
Treatment

Clean and dress the wound with a healing salve or poultice.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 600

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Injuries • Piercing • Rogue Needle Prick

Injury Card

Rogue Needle Prick

A mischievous ghost has replaced your blood with cherry syrup. Attacks now pierce as if you're a gelatinous cube. Your party may notice a mysterious sweet scent following you around.

Stranger Stitch
Treatment

Sip a cup of warming tea made from freshly squeezed kelp. Can be found at any apothecary.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 1200

  • Status Effect: Deafened

  • duration: 7200

Injuries • Piercing • Spear In The Side

Injury Card

Spear In The Side

A sharp pain jolts through the character's side as if struck by a spear. The wound throbs persistently, making each movement a reminder of the injury.

Painful Reminder
Treatment

Stabilize the wound and rest to prevent aggravating the injury.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 1200

  • Status Effect: Prone

Injuries • Piercing • Stabbed Flesh

Injury Card

Stabbed Flesh

The forceful stab into the flesh creates a cavity of agony, where tissue is rent asunder and nerves scream in protest. Each moment a symphony of pain, as the wound throbs with every heartbeat.

Treatment

Stabilizing the stabbed flesh with pressure and controlling bleeding are crucial steps in managing the injury. Seeking medical assessment for deeper penetration or potential organ involvement is essential for proper treatment and preventing complications.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 60

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Piercing • Stabbing Pain

Injury Card

Stabbing Pain

The stabbing pain of a puncture wound radiates with relentless intensity, a constant reminder of the invasive nature of the injury. Each breath a struggle, as the wound pulsates with a rhythm of its own.

Treatment

Prompt wound care, including cleaning, disinfection, and dressing, is crucial for preventing infection and promoting healing. Monitoring for signs of complications and seeking medical evaluation for persistent pain are essential for effective management.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Injuries • Piercing • Stuck Like A Thistle

Injury Card

Stuck Like A Thistle

A small thorn-like protrusion remains embedded in the character's skin, causing discomfort whenever pressure is applied. Movement feels slightly hindered due to the irritation.

Herbal Alchemy
Treatment

Gently extract the thorn and apply a soothing ointment.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

Injuries • Piercing • Tortle's Unlucky Jab

Injury Card

Tortle's Unlucky Jab

A clumsy tortle mistook your arm for a tree trunk. You now have the ability to stretch your neck like a giraffe - handy for high shelves, not so much in battle. Eating salads whole is the new style.

Shell Shock
Treatment

Embrace the gift and introduce yourself to the nearest zoo or circus. Carrots and leafy greens are now your go-to snack.

Details

  • Category: Piercing

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 4800

  • Status Effect: Prone
